When Tesla unveiled utility-scale Powerpack battery 2015, analysts observers excitedly proclaimed product's price point would revolutionize electric grid operations business models cost benchmarks energy storage. despite hype, reception from utilities tepid best.
This experience unique Tesla. leads question: What's stopping utilities from quickly pivoting energy technologies? Unlike other industries that quickly adopt technology, utilities their regulators must make more cautious deliberations.
Utilities operate differently than other industries. They must balance service obligations, regulatory oversight, investor preferences. utilities must navigate relationships with third-party stakeholders technology providers.
this series articles, will closely examine barriers facing adoption new, advanced energy technologies that revolutionize United States electric grids utility business models. Through interviews with stakeholders, will highlight solutions stimulate transformation this expansive industry. Let's kick things looking stakeholders this sector their priorities.

percent people United States their electricity from investor-owned utilities (IOUs). IOUs owned managed shareholders receive regulated return investment.
After IOUs, utilities serve next-most electric customers.
Municipal utilities owned local governments managed elected officials public employees. They only serve customers within their municipal boundaries immediately surrounding areas.
State public power authorities like Long Island Power Authority federal power marketing administrations like Bonneville Power Administration also operate electric generation transmission infrastructure not-for-profit basis.
Finally, utility cooperatives nonprofit utilities that owned operated their customers. This allows customers have greater influence over utility operations. Co-ops particularly prevalent central western United States.

This structure allows IOUs recover operating expenses earn "reasonable" return investments. Utilities compelled satisfy their side regulatory compact most efficient effective possible.

Mirage Mirage French answer requirement supersonic fighter aircraft fifties. fitted with large delta wing which became trademark famous Mirage series. Delta wings were used beacuse their good high speed capabilities cost speed field performance. will find horizontal stabilizer this plane!
Mirage considered competitor American Lockheed F-104 Starfighter adversary Soviet Mikoyan MiG-21 Cold War.
Mirage various variants appeared including Mirage ground strike fighter. Usually engine SNECMA Atar version with afterburner. Intakes have moveable half shock cone. ejection seat usually Martin Baker seat (licensed built French Hispano Suiza). Usually canon armament 30mm DEFA cannons below intakes.
Mirage IIIB seat version with radar fuselage longer seat crew. first flew October 1959 were built (most French Armee l'Air Peru Lebanon, aircraft Switzerland, South Africa).
Mirage IIIC main first operational weather interceptor flew first October 1960 Cyrano Ibis radar. Optional SEPR rocket dash speeds below lower rear fuselage. Usually missile Matra R.530 fitted often 30mm guns. Ground attack missions were also possible. First order French also Swiss with total built, including Israel with different equipment from 1963, aircraft South Africa.
Mirage IIID seat version RAAF. Some also delivered Lebanon, with aircraft Pakistan.
Mirage IIIE version long range fighter bomber with SNECMA Atar engine optional SEPR rocket. fuselage that longer front intakes compared earlier versions. easily seen cockpit sides. Often Doppler fitted below nose radar Cyrano. Over aircraft were built with first delivery started beginning 1964. Sub-versions include: Lebanon, Pakistan, South Africa delivered 1965 period. Mirage IIIO Australia some other systems.
Mirage IIIR reconnaissance version Omega camera's nose radar. Doppler below nose could carry gallon tanks. Other deliveries were Pakistan, Switzerland. similar SAAF.
Mirage Mirage ground attack version derived from radar fitted flying under VFR. simpler systems probably simpler landing gear less that stations carry stores. Some could also interceptors with Sidewinder missile. Mirage Israel.
Mirage Belgium with again radar with better navigation system. seater Belgium recon version with Vinten camera's. arrestor hook SABCA made type license. Later systems flare dispensers.
Revell 1/32 scale Mirage issued long 1975 appeared various boxes. Mirage later Mirage series.
